title: Agent update — {{name}}
confirmDesc: The agent will download the latest version served by the server, replace its binary then restart. The connection is interrupted for a few seconds; this window follows the operation until it reconnects on the new version.
confirmWarning: ⚠ This update replaces <0>only the binary</0>. The <1>sudoers</1> file and the systemd service are not touched — if they changed (e.g. a new command to authorize), you must <2>reinstall the agent</2> (<3>install-agent.sh</3>) or use "Re-enroll". The "⚠ Sudoers" badge flags it.
successText: Agent up to date and reconnected{{version}}.

errors.timeout: Timed out: the agent did not reconnect with the new version. Check the agent over SSH (panel below).

debug.title: Debug & SSH access
debug.noIp: No known IP for this machine — <0>SSH config</0>.
